SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure

Class InMemoryParticipantRepository

java.lang.Object
com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure.InMemoryParticipantRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
ParticipantRepository
@Repository public class InMemoryParticipantRepository extends Object implements ParticipantRepository
Thread-safe in-memory implementation of ParticipantRepository.

Participants register themselves at startup. The map key is the stable serverId.

    • findById

      public Optional<RegisteredParticipant> findById(String serverId)
      Description copied from interface: ParticipantRepository
      Look up a participant by its stable server identifier.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface ParticipantRepository
      Parameters:
      serverId - the stable server ID (e.g. "server-1").
      Returns:
      the participant wrapped in an Optional, or empty if not found.

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(String serverId, NodeStatus status)
      Description copied from interface: ParticipantRepository
      Update the online/offline status of a participant.
      Specified by:
      updateStatus in interface ParticipantRepository
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server whose status changes.
      status - the new status.
